name: musicbrainz
description: Integrazione con MusicBrainz e Cover Art Archive per metadati musicali. Cerca per barcode, fornisce artista, album, tracklist, etichetta, copertine HD. Open data, nessun token richiesto.
author: Fabiodalez

hooks.name: scrape.sources
hooks.description: Adds MusicBrainz as a scraping source for music media

hooks.name: scrape.fetch.custom
hooks.description: Fetches metadata from MusicBrainz API by barcode

hooks.name: scrape.data.modify
hooks.description: Enriches data with Cover Art Archive covers

features: Copertine HD da Cover Art Archive
